title: RetentionManifest (v1)
description: Operator-published retention manifest. Signed; browser-side re-verifiable through the same primitive pattern as verifySkillBundle (commit 87e2f174).

spec.description: Specification version. MUST be `motebit/retention-manifest@1` for this version.

operator_id.description: The operator publishing this manifest. Cross-references the operator-transparency manifest's `operator_id`.

issued_at.description: Unix milliseconds when the manifest was signed.

store_id.description: Stable identifier for the store within the operator's deployment.

max_retention_days_by_sensitivity.description: Map of sensitivity-level string → max retention days. Keys: `none | personal | medical | financial | secret`. Values MUST be at-or-below `MAX_RETENTION_DAYS_BY_SENSITIVITY` for every key. `Infinity` is encoded as JSON's `null` — schemas accept either; verifiers normalize.

horizon_advance_period_days.description: How often the operator advances the store's horizon, in days.

witness_required.description: Whether co-witness signatures are required on horizon certs for this store. Decision 9: this value is DERIVED from federation state — verifiers SHOULD cross-check against the operator's federation discovery surface (spec/discovery-v1.md) at manifest issuance time. A relay with peers cannot honestly publish `witness_required: false`.

flush_to.description: Default disposition for flushed records that did not consolidate into a memory node.

has_min_floor_resolver.description: Whether this store registers a per-record min-floor resolver (decision 3). When true, settlement-relevant records carry an obligation floor beyond the sensitivity floor. The resolver itself is BSL runtime code; the manifest declares only its presence so users can confirm the operator runs an obligation-aware flush.

stores.description: Per-store retention declarations. The drift gate `check-retention-coverage` enumerates every store holding sensitivity-classified content and asserts each appears here.

pre_classification_default_sensitivity.description: Default sensitivity for un-classified pre-deploy records under `consolidation_flush` (decision 6b). Defaults to `personal` if omitted. The operator's lazy-classify-on-flush path uses this value as the floor until classification fires.

honest_gaps.description: Operator-declared gaps. Same pattern as operator-transparency.md §'Reference implementation' — stage 1 ships with the chain-anchor in honest_gaps until stage 2.

suite.description: Cryptosuite identifier. `motebit-jcs-ed25519-hex-v1`: JCS canonicalization, Ed25519 primitive, hex signature encoding, hex public-key encoding. Sibling to the operator-transparency manifest.

signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature over `canonicalJson(manifest minus signature)`, signed by the operator's transparency key.
